'''[[Xandel Carivus]]'s [[Cloning/Legends|clone]]''' was created by [[Black Sun/Legends|Black Sun]] as part of a plan to take control of the [[Imperial Ruling Council/Legends#The "Council of Blood"|Interim Ruling Council]] by replacing its members with clones. He was part of the group sent to assassinate the real Xandel Carivus. They failed, and the clone was shot and killed by one of Carivus's [[Xandel Carivus's Private Guard|guards]].

==Appearances==
*[[Crimson Empire II: Council of Blood 4|''Crimson Empire II: Council of Blood'' 4]] {{1st}}
*[[Crimson Empire II: Council of Blood 5|''Crimson Empire II: Council of Blood'' 5]] {{Mo}}
